raw_consumer_statement:
My Citi XXXX Visa was charged for two transactions I did NOT make. 
XX/XX/XXXX -- I noticed 2 transactions totaling {$5400.00} : XXXX XXXX XXXX, {$2400.00} and XXXX XXXX XXXX, {$3000.00}. 
I called Citi immediately and said my XXXX account had been hacked and he Citi Visa card which was linked was compromised. Citi fraud dept. came back and said since I had the card the transactions must be mine. No resolution. 
I opened a second dispute as a billing dispute -- same outcome. Citi said since I had the card the transactions must be mine. 
-- Filed a police report for credit card theft -- Called XXXX  per Citi and they said there were no transactions matching my descriptions. 
-- I rarely use XXXX and never for anything over {$170.00} ( let alone {$5400.00} ). 
XXXX Citi said that I had " experience " with the merchant ( XXXX ), so it must be my transactions. 
-- I have no knowledge of XXXX XXXX and hope that XXXX can help. I believe Citi just blew me off. I was hacked and Citi is not living up to its promise as a customer. 
--
